basic_details.job_title: HPPTCL Apprentice Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 25 Posts
basic_details.short_information: H.P. Power Transmission Corporation Limited (HPPTCL) has released an official recruitment notification inviting applications for 27 Apprentice Trainee posts exclusively from Bonafide Himachali Female candidates. The apprenticeship is for a fixed period of one year under the World Bank-funded "Himachal Pradesh Power Sector Development Program." The last date to apply is 10 July 2026, and applications must be submitted by post to the Managing Director, HPPTCL, Shimla.

application_fee.details: The HPPTCL Apprentice 2026 notification does not mention any application fee. Candidates should confirm this on the official application proforma available at www.hpptcl.com before submitting.

age_limit.details: Candidates wondering about eligibility should first confirm that only Bonafide Himachali Female candidates are eligible - applications from male candidates or non-Himachali residents will not be considered. Additionally, result-awaited candidates are explicitly not permitted to apply. | The diploma or degree of the candidate must not be more than 5 years old from the date of passing the examination to the date of joining the apprenticeship training. This is a strict condition and candidates with older qualifications are ineligible.

qualification.details: Candidates wondering about eligibility should first confirm that only Bonafide Himachali Female candidates are eligible - applications from male candidates or non-Himachali residents will not be considered. Additionally, result-awaited candidates are explicitly not permitted to apply.

salary_details.details: The HPPTCL Apprentice 2026 notification confirms that a fixed monthly stipend shall be paid during the one-year training period. The exact stipend amount per post is not specified in the notification. Candidates are advised to refer to the official application proforma or contact HPPTCL directly for stipend details. | The apprenticeship training comes with no guarantee of employment upon completion. The engagement is strictly for one year with no extension whatsoever.

selection_process: There is no interview for HPPTCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026. Candidates wondering how shortlisting works can note that selection will be based entirely on marks obtained in Matric / +2 / Diploma / Degree examinations. Shortlisted candidates will then be required to produce original testimonials
and age proof at the time of document verification.
by post) Shortlisting based on academic marks (Matric/+2/Diploma/Degree) Document verification - originals must be presented Final selection and registration under BOAT/NATS Portal
Candidates who have already been registered and received training under BOAT or NATS are not eligible and need not apply.
how_to_apply: Candidates should follow these numbered steps carefully. Applications submitted through any mode other than the prescribed offline format will not be entertained.
Visit the official HPPTCL website at www.hpptcl.com
Download the application proforma from the website
Fill in all required details accurately - name must be written exactly as it appears on the matriculation certificate
Attach self-attested copies of educational certificates (10th / +2 / Diploma / Degree Certificate)
Ensure all information is correct before final submission, as incomplete applications will be rejected outright
Send the completed application form by post to: Managing Director, HPPTCL, Himfed Bhawan, Panjari, Shimla-171005
Only one application per candidate is permitted. If multiple applications are received, only the most recent one will be considered and earlier applications will be rejected.

faq.question: Q1. Who is eligible to apply for HPPTCL Apprentice 2026?
faq.answer: Only Bonafide Himachali Female candidates aged between 18 and 30 years (as on the closing date) with the relevant educational qualification for the chosen trade are eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for HPPTCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form by post to HPPTCL, Shimla is 10 July 2026. Applications received after this date will not be considered.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available in HPPTCL Apprentice 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 27 Apprentice Trainee vacancies are available across 9 trade categories including Engineering, IT, Finance, HR, Environment, and Social disciplines.

faq.question: Q4. Is there an application fee for HPPTCL Apprentice 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee. Candidates should verify this on the official proforma available at www.hpptcl.com.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for HPPTCL Apprentice 2026?
faq.answer: There is no interview. Selection is based purely on marks obtained in Matric, +2, Diploma, or Degree examinations. Shortlisted candidates must appear for document verification with original certificates.

faq.question: Q6. Can male candidates apply for HPPTCL Apprentice 2026?
faq.answer: No. This recruitment is exclusively open to Bonafide Himachali Female candidates only. Applications from male candidates will not be entertained.
